text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I head over to the training<n>track...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Phew... How was mytime?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Perfection! And talk about form! Hey,<n>you!
Wasn't she amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm guessin' that hot spring trip<n>really paid off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we went to a hot spring the<n>other day, just
the two of us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Mmm... That water felt sooo good...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But how come you invited me to the<n>hot spring all
of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You've been working yourself to the<n>bone lately,
so I figured washing your<n>fatigue away would do
you some<n>good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to get away from the daily<n>grind every
once in a while, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Palmer... Ehehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I booked us in for a beauty treatment<n>after this
too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
B-beauty treatment?! Uh, that's not<n>really my
thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, just give it a try! It's not<n>every day that
you can get the full<n>spa experience!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sure, it might be important to focus,<n>but you need
to escape sometimes<n>too, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I wasn't expecting a beauty<n>treatment,
but I think my muscles are<n>looking way shinier
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, that manga you<n>were reading
the other day had a<n>scene where that couple ran
away to<n>a hot spring too, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It was so swoon-worthy! The<n>way they
held hands as they walked<n>along the mountain
path...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. How do you know about my<n>favorite
manga?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, 'cause I like that comic too! ♪ A<n>romantic
getaway sounds so dreamy.<n>Like lovers on the
run...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: L-l-lovers?! What are you talking<n>about, Palmer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: C'mon, don't be like that! Lemme<n>explain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Y'know how characters in manga<n>always tell
each other how they feel<n>when they run off to
somewhere<n>unfamiliar?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That means their runaway romance is<n>what
saves the day!
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's true that unfamiliar experiences help
you grow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That means their runaway romance is<n>what
saves the day!
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's true that unfamiliar experiences help
you grow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you escaped your grueling<n>training routine
by running off to the<n>hot spring, and that helped
you give<n>your muscles some TLC, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Your muscles are always taking good<n>care of
you, right? And this trip helped<n>you express your
love for 'em, didn't<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right! I haven'tbeen showing my muscles enoughlove and care lately!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've been in such a rush to workoutthat I've been pushing them toohard... I guess I never thought abouthow they felt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Palmer! You've really<n>opened my
eyes to something super<n>important!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! Glad to help. And don't forget<n>to give
your muscles more runaway<n>romance! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, training is kinda like escaping<n>from
everyday life anyway, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! So the hot spring and<n>beauty
treatment were a form of<n>training to help
strengthen my mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Palmer! I'm gonna go hit the<n>showers
and ice up my muscles like<n>a monk standing
under a waterfall!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nice! I'd expect nothing less from a<n>muscle
maniac like you. A waterfall<n>escape... Now that
sounds refreshing.<n>♪
